The drone must not descend below 40 meters except for calibration at designated points. If wind speed exceeds 35 km/h, it climbs to safe altitude and hovers until conditions stabilize. When battery capacity falls under 20%, it must return to base within 60 seconds. Eventually, all zones must be scanned and their data transmitted to the control center.

AgroDrone returns to base within 60 seconds when battery < 20%
Eventually all data transmitted to control center
Eventually AgroDrone must scan all ten sub-zones
